sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value String, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'example1', now()), (2, 'example2', now()), (3, NULL, now()), (4, 'example3', now()), (5, 'example4', now());
SELECT uniqCombined(SELECT NOT value FROM test_table WHERE created_at > now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS unique_negated_values;
SELECT id, uniqCombined(value) AS unique_values FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING unique_values > 1;
SELECT DISTINCT value, uniqCombined(value) AS unique_count FROM (SELECT NOT value AS negated_value FROM test_table) GROUP BY negated_value;
SELECT uniqCombined(1, 'test', NULL, NOT value) FROM test_table;
SELECT id, uniqCombined(value) AS unique_values FROM (SELECT id, value, NOT created_at FROM test_table) GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, uniqCombined(id, 10.5, 'string', NOT created_at) FROM (SELECT id, created_at FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY id;
SELECT uniqCombined(uniqCombined(value), NOT(value = 'example1'), value) FROM test_table;
SELECT NOT uniqCombined(value) FROM test_table WHERE created_at IS NULL;
